hero.name: Milena
hero.bio: Communications and media professional based in Doha, with experience enhancing the visibility of diplomatic, educational, and public institutions across the Gulf. Experienced in strategic communications, media relations, digital engagement, content creation, and video production, with a strong understanding of the Qatari media landscape and regional cultural dynamics. Secured media coverage in Al Jazeera, Gulf Times, Qatar Tribune, Doha News, The Peninsula, and QNA.

items.title: Media Placement: Kwibuka 31 Commemoration in Qatar
items.desc: Press release drafted and successfully placed in The Peninsula, showcasing media relations and strategic communications work. Part of a broader portfolio of content published across Gulf Times, Doha News, Qatar Tribune, and Al Jazeera.

items.title: Gulf Times Supplement About Rwanda
items.desc: Led the creation of an eight-page print and digital supplement in partnership with Gulf Times, sourcing content, shaping the editorial narrative, and designing the reader experience.The supplement introduced Rwanda's culture, history, and people to audiences across Qatar and served as a flagship visibility piece for the Embassy.

items.title: Georgetown University Qatar - Rwanda Journey Piece
items.desc: A collaborative editorial piece documenting Georgetown University Qatar's journey to Rwanda, published on the Embassy website.

items.title: UCI World Championship - Influencer Campaign Video
items.desc: Collaborated with Qatari influencer Lulwa Al-Marri (@she.is.lulwa) to produce social media content during her participation in the UCI World Championships in Rwanda. Responsible for filming and editing a video that highlighted her experience and promoted Rwanda as a host destination to a regional audience.

items.title: Horticulture Expo 2023 - Promotional Video
items.desc: Developed the script and directed the videography team for Rwanda's Horticulture Expo promotion. I translated a complex institutional message into a visually compelling story, overseeing the full production process from brief to final cut.

items.title: Event Photography
items.desc: Visual documentation of MoU signings, high-level meetings, and diplomatic functions across Qatar. These images were shot for institutional use across social media, press, and official communications, combining professional quality with platform-ready framing.

items.title: Graphic Design & Visual Assets
items.desc: Custom graphics and visual assets created in Canva and Adobe Illustrator for cultural celebrations, national elections, and public awareness campaigns. Each piece was tailored to platform specifications, audience expectations, and brand tone.

items.title: Media Familiarization Trip Campaign
items.desc: Rwanda's story was often told through outdated lenses. I conceptualized and led a flagship media trip initiative, inviting journalists and digital creators from Al Jazeera, Doha News, Qatar Tribune, and other regional outlets to experience Rwanda firsthand. I managed the end-to-end campaign,  from media selection and logistics to briefing, hosting, and follow-up, generating 26 media placements across Qatar and the Gulf.
items.tags: Media Relations, Campaign Management, Cultural Diplomacy

items.title: Crisis Communications
items.desc: During a period of regional instability, I served as the round-the-clock communications focal point for Rwandan nationals in Qatar, drafting and disseminating official statements, coordinating public safety messaging, and managing real-time information flow in alignment with diplomatic protocol.

journey.section_sub: Institutions that trust me to tell their stories - diplomacy, higher education, and creative industries, across Qatar and beyond.

jobs.org: Embassy of the Republic of Rwanda to the State of Qatar
jobs.desc: Lead strategic communications and cultural diplomacy initiatives while managing public-facing projects, international events and exhibitions, and stakeholder relations.

jobs.role: Acting Executive Assistant to the Ambassador (Interim)
jobs.org: Embassy of the Republic of Rwanda to the State of Qatar
jobs.desc: Supported diplomatic coordination, institutional communication, and administrative workflow during high-level engagements and events.
Assisted with public diplomacy initiatives, event support, and development of communication materials for outreach programs.
Supported multimedia storytelling, content production, and communication projects focused on youth and institutional programs.
Managed social media content and digital campaigns for student-led media projects and events.
Assisted in digital content creation and marketing communications across multiple platforms.
Supported student services, communications, and event coordination within the Student Affairs department.

education.section_sub: Across Education City universities - advanced skills in communication, social media, and digital storytelling in a richly multicultural environment.

degrees.title: Master of Arts in Digital Humanities and Societies
BS in Communication, Major in Media Industries & Technology
Minor in Media and Politics
degrees.school: NU-Q in collaboration with Georgetown University – Qatar

items.title: The Speaking Circle
items.desc: Co-founded a public speaking community that organizes workshops, events, and The Speaking Circle podcast.

items.title: Cooking
items.desc: When I'm not crafting messages, I'm mixing flavors. Cooking is my hobby, my therapy, and my favourite way to communicate.

items.title: Volunteering
items.desc: Because someone opened the door for me, I make sure it stays open for those behind me through giving back to the community.

contact.quote: I would love to hear about your experience and how we can work together.
